title: Welcome
body: This site reads posts from posts.json in the repository. Anyone visiting the page will see the same entries. To add or change posts, edit posts.json in your GitHub repo, then commit and push.
zhBody: 本站文章来自仓库里的 posts.json，所有访客看到的内容一致。要发表或修改文章，请在 GitHub 上编辑 posts.json，保存后提交并推送即可。
